MINI MINUTES:
RULING:

MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT RANDALL DELAPP'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED as to the 1st Cause of Action with 10 days leave to amend to add facts establishing a fiduciary relationship if he can do so in good faith; OVERRULED as to the 2nd and 3rd Causes of Action. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
